projects.title: Tech Portfolio Platform
projects.tagline: Founder-level personal website with scalable architecture
projects.description: Designed and built a modern, animated portfolio website intended to reflect the presence of a tech company co-founder.
projects.problem: Most developer portfolios are static, hard-coded, and difficult to scale as projects grow.
projects.solution: Implemented a data-driven architecture where projects are defined via structured JSON, allowing easy expansion without UI refactoring.
architecture: Smooth motion system for UI transitions
impact: Projects can be added without touching UI code
Clean separation of data and presentation
Professional visual identity suitable for founders
Scalable structure for long-term growth

projects.title: Flutter Mobile Application
projects.tagline: Cross-platform mobile app built with Flutter
projects.description: Built a mobile application using Flutter, focusing on clean UI, responsive layouts, and cross-platform compatibility.
projects.problem: Building separate apps for Android and iOS increases development time and complexity.
projects.solution: Used Flutter to create a single codebase that runs consistently across platforms.
impact: Single codebase for multiple platforms
Consistent UI across devices
Fast development iteration
Production-ready mobile foundation

projects.title: ASL Gesture Recognition System
projects.tagline: Real-time sign language interpretation using computer vision and ML
projects.description: Developed a real-time American Sign Language recognition system that converts hand gestures into readable text and speech. Designed for accessibility and real-world usability.
projects.problem: Communication barriers exist for deaf and hard-of-hearing individuals, and most available solutions are either inaccurate, expensive, or not real-time.
projects.solution: Built a computer vision pipeline using hand landmark detection and a trained ML model to classify gestures. Implemented temporal smoothing to reduce false predictions and integrated text-to-speech output.
architecture: Custom-trained ML model for gesture classification
impact: Real-time gesture recognition with low latency
Improved prediction stability through temporal filtering
End-to-end pipeline from camera input to speech output
Foundation for full sign-language sentence construction

projects.title: Hand-Controlled Mouse System
projects.tagline: Gesture-based cursor control using computer vision
projects.description: Built a hands-free mouse control system that allows users to move the cursor, click, and drag using hand gestures captured via webcam.
projects.problem: Traditional input devices are not accessible to all users, and existing gesture-control solutions lack precision and smoothness.
projects.solution: Mapped hand landmark coordinates to screen space with smoothing algorithms. Implemented gesture detection for click, drag, and scroll actions.
architecture: MediaPipe hand tracking for landmark detection
Gesture state machine for mouse actions
impact: Accurate cursor control using only hand movement
Reduced jitter through interpolation and damping
Supports click, drag, and drop interactions
Hands-free interaction suitable for accessibility use cases

projects.title: Python Automation Systems
projects.description: Built multiple automation scripts to handle repetitive tasks such as file processing, system control, and data handling.
projects.problem: Manual workflows were time-consuming, error-prone, and inefficient.
projects.solution: Designed modular Python automation tools with reusable components and configurable inputs.
impact: Significant reduction in manual task time
Improved consistency and reliability
Reusable automation modules
Foundation for larger automation pipelines

projects.title: Machine Learning with Python
projects.tagline: Applied ML models for real-world problems
projects.description: Developed machine learning models for classification and prediction tasks, focusing on practical deployment rather than academic demos.
projects.problem: Raw data without intelligence provides limited value.
projects.solution: Applied supervised learning techniques with proper preprocessing, evaluation, and optimization.
impact: Accurate predictions on real datasets
Reusable ML pipelines
Hands-on ML engineering experience
Foundation for advanced AI systems
